channel.title: Stewart Jamieson
channel.description: Stewart Jamieson — Head of Technology at Themis AI. Writing on risk-aware, uncertainty-aware AI: technical deep-dives and AI strategy & systems.

item.title: Acting on Low Confidence: Hedge, Abstain, or Escalate
item.description: When a system is unsure, the cost of being wrong — not the confidence score — should decide whether it hedges, abstains, or calls a human.

item.title: Building Reliable Systems from Uncertainty-Aware Components
item.description: Reliable AI systems come from how you handle uncertainty across components — not from making any single component better. A short field guide.
